title: ‘Mahjong’ is released
subtitle: Board game by
fact: Mahjong is a tile-based game that was developed in the 19th century in China and has spread throughout the world since the early 20th century.

title: ‘Monopoly’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Hasbro
fact: Monopoly is a multiplayer economics-themed board game.

title: ‘The Settlers of Catan’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Franckh-Kosmos
fact: Catan, previously known as The Settlers of Catan or simply Settlers, is a multiplayer board game designed by Klaus Teuber.

title: ‘Scrabble’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Hasbro
fact: Scrabble is a word game in which two to four players score points by placing tiles, each bearing a single letter, onto a game board divided into a 15×15 grid of squares.

title: ‘Cluedo’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Miro Company
fact: Cluedo, known as Clue in North America, is a murder mystery game for three to six players that was devised in 1943 by British board game designer Anthony E.

title: ‘Risk’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Hasbro
fact: Risk is a strategy board game of diplomacy, conflict and conquest for two to six players.

title: ‘Battleship’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Hasbro
fact: Battleship is a strategy type guessing game for two players.

title: ‘Mastermind’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Hasbro
fact: Mastermind or Master Mind is a code-breaking game for two players invented in Israel.

title: ‘The Game of Life’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Hasbro
fact: The Game of Life, also known simply as Life, is a board game originally created in 1860 by Milton Bradley as The Checkered Game of Life, the first ever board game for his own company, the Milton Bradley Company.

title: ‘Ticket to Ride’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Bandai
fact: Ticket to Ride is a series of turn-based strategy railway-themed Eurogames designed by Alan R.

title: ‘Diplomacy’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Miro Company
fact: Diplomacy is a strategic board game created by Allan B.

title: ‘Codenames’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Iello
fact: Codenames is a 2015 party board game designed by Vlaada Chvátil and published by Czech Games Edition (CGE).

title: ‘Trivial Pursuit’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Hasbro
fact: Trivial Pursuit is a Canadian board game in which winning is determined by a player's ability to answer trivia and popular culture questions.

title: ‘Illuminati’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Steve Jackson Games
fact: Illuminati is a card game made by Steve Jackson Games (SJG), inspired by the 1975 book series The Illuminatus!

title: ‘Guess Who?’ is released
subtitle: Board game by
fact: Guess Who?

title: ‘Axis & Allies’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Milton Bradley Company
fact: Axis & Allies is a series of World War II strategy board games.

title: ‘Hex’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Parker Brothers
fact: Hex is a two-player abstract strategy board game in which players attempt to connect opposite sides of a rhombus-shaped board made of hexagonal cells.

title: ‘HeroQuest’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Games Workshop
fact: HeroQuest is an adventure board game created by the American board game manufacturer Milton Bradley in conjunction with the British company Games Workshop in 1989, and re-released in 2021.

title: ‘Twister’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Milton Bradley Company
fact: Twister is a game of physical skill produced by Milton Bradley Company and Winning Moves Games USA.

title: ‘Blood Bowl’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Games Workshop
fact: Blood Bowl is a miniatures board game created by Jervis Johnson for the British games company Games Workshop as a parody of American football.

title: ‘Scythe’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Matagot
fact: Scythe is a board game for one to five players designed by Jamey Stegmaier and published by Stonemaier Games in 2016.

title: ‘Mensch ärgere dich nicht’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Schmidt Spiele
fact: Mensch ärgere Dich nicht is a German race game developed by Josef Friedrich Schmidt in 1907/1908.

title: ‘Pandemic’ is released
subtitle: Board game by
fact: Pandemic is a cooperative board game designed by Matt Leacock and first published by Z-Man Games in the United States in 2008.

title: ‘7 Wonders’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Hobby Japan
fact: 7 Wonders is a board game created by Antoine Bauza in 2010 and originally published by Repos Production.

title: ‘Splendor’ is released
subtitle: Board game by
fact: Splendor is a multiplayer card-based board game, designed by Marc André and illustrated by Pascal Quidault.

title: ‘Talisman’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Games Workshop
fact: Talisman: The Magical Quest Game is a fantasy-themed adventure board game for two to six players, originally designed and produced by Games Workshop.

title: ‘Terraforming Mars’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Arclight
fact: Terraforming Mars is a board game for 1 to 5 players designed by Jacob Fryxelius and published by FryxGames in 2016, and thereafter by 12 others, including Stronghold Games.

title: ‘Mordheim’ is released
subtitle: Board game by
fact: Mordheim is a tabletop game published by Games Workshop in 1999.

title: ‘Arkham Horror (1st Edition)’ is released
subtitle: Board game by
fact: Arkham Horror is a cooperative adventure board game designed by Richard Launius, originally published in 1987 by Chaosium.

title: ‘Scotland Yard’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Ravensburger
fact: Scotland Yard is a board game in which a team of players controlling different detectives cooperate to track down a player controlling a criminal as they move around a board representing the streets of London.

title: ‘Agricola’ is released
subtitle: Board game by
fact: Agricola is a Euro-style board game created by Uwe Rosenberg.

title: ‘Abalone’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Asmodee
fact: Abalone is a two-player abstract strategy board game designed by Michel Lalet and Laurent Lévi in 1987.

title: ‘Quarto’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Gigamic
fact: Quarto is a board game for two players invented by Swiss mathematician Blaise Muller.

title: ‘Puerto Rico’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Rio Grande Games
fact: Puerto Rico is a Euro-style board game designed by German designer Andreas Seyfarth and published in 2002 in a German-language edition by Alea.

title: ‘Small World’ is released
subtitle: Board game by Asmodee
fact: Small World is a board game designed by Philippe Keyaerts, Illustrated by Miguel Coimbra and Cyrille Daujean as graphic designer, and published by Days of Wonder in 2009.

title: ‘GNU Chess’ is released
subtitle: Board game by
fact: GNU Chess is a free software chess engine and command-line interface chessboard.
